items.prompt: Cursors on a wave pane mainly help you…
choices: Mark times and measure intervals between interesting edges
Choosing how values display (e.g. binary vs hex)
Choosing the top file name only

items.prompt: If a signal is missing from the wave, first…
choices: Select the right scope and add it from Signals
items.explain: Waves show what you add from a scope.

items.prompt: A useful starter wave set often includes clock, reset, and the outputs you care about.
items.explain: Start focused; add more nets as needed.
